meta.title: Simple Export to Markdown demo
meta.description: Playground demo that installs and opens the Simple Export to Markdown plugin in the post editor.
meta.author: Pavel Sherer

steps.code:
1, 'post_title' => 'Simple Export to Markdown demo', 'post_content' => '

This is a demo post for the Simple Export to Markdown plugin. Open the Settings sidebar, find the Export to Markdown panel and try exporting this post.

Sample content

  • Heading
  • List
', 'post_status' => 'publish', 'post_type' => 'post' ) );
